verbatim_quote: "...trade of apples and pears and related processed products"; "five products: fresh apples (080810)..."; "we replace the missing value by the default MRL"
implication_for_our_policy: ỦNG HỘ trade-coverage: bài MRL-commodity sát nhất GỒM processed-primary, KHÔNG RAC-only. Default-fill trùng dự án.

RAC_only_or_includes_processed: product-level, không phân biệt rõ RAC/processed
verbatim_quote: "matched 243 agricultural products to their corresponding harmonized system (HS) codes at the six digit"
implication_for_our_policy: HS6 là chuẩn; không hạn chế RAC-only.

verbatim_quote: "each product is mapped to an HS6-digit code"; "product coverage is more focussed on HS Chapters 7"
"...HS6 digit categories...we aggregate this HS6 digit STCs to the country level"
implication_for_our_policy: HS6 chuẩn; mức gộp linh hoạt.

verbatim_quote: "...tariff data are used at HS6-digit level"

RAC_only_or_includes_processed: **RAC làm gốc, MỞ sang processed qua processing factor**
verbatim_quote: "applies to products...used as fresh, processed and/or composite food"; MRLs set for unprocessed (apples/tomatoes/wheat grain); for processed, "MRLs applicable shall be those...for the relevant product covered by Annex I, taking into account changes...caused by processing" (Art 20)
implication_for_our_policy: BẰNG CHỨNG PHÁP LÝ MẠNH NHẤT: MRL định nghĩa trên RAC nhưng áp lên processed qua processing factor → đúng mô hình TRADE_COVERAGE_PRIMARY + RAC sàn. Default 0.01 trùng dự án.

verbatim_quote: "Codex standard on total aflatoxin contamination in **processed and unprocessed food**"
implication_for_our_policy: Precedent: chuẩn áp cả processed + unprocessed.

verbatim_quote: "identify 109 plant products of which the commodity descriptions can be mapped with...the 4-digit [/6-digit]"
"...analysis at the firm-product level"; cites Shingal HS6-digit MRL harmonisation
implication_for_our_policy: HS6 chuẩn; mức firm-product khả thi.

RAC_only_or_includes_processed: HS6 match trade; MRL apply 315 fresh+processed products
verbatim_quote: "MRL data mapped to HS6 to match trade data"; "MRLs apply to 315 fresh and processed agricultural products"
implication_for_our_policy: HS6 chuẩn; processed included ở cấp regulation.

RAC_only_or_includes_processed: **RAC standard áp ở mức bao trùm dạng buôn**; green coffee + milled rice
verbatim_quote: "Green Coffee Beans (HS 0901.11) account for 97.6% of total coffee volume, while Milled and Broken Rice (HS 1006.30/40) collectively comprise 97.9%"; "applying the Raw Agricultural Commodity (RAC) standard to the HS4 aggregate correctly identifies the binding regulatory"
implication_for_our_policy: XÁC NHẬN policy ta: cà phê→green 090111 (97.6%); gạo→milled 100630/640 (97.9%, KHÔNG phải paddy). RAC-only paddy bỏ sót 98% gạo VN.

verbatim_quote: "Trade impact of maximum residue limits in **fresh** fruits and vegetables"; bilateral dis(similarity) stringency index by chemical class
implication_for_our_policy: Cho FFV tươi (phần lớn panel ta): fresh=RAC=trade → fresh-only chuẩn, không mâu thuẫn.
